query: SELECT id, groupName, aliases, trend, rwThreatLevel, totalVictims, topSectors, topCountries, status FROM ransomware_groups WHERE groupName LIKE '%FULCRUM%' OR groupName LIKE '%Fulcrum%' OR groupName LIKE '%fulcrum%';
